conservative.name: Fires of Faith
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. You must have a torch, brazier, or other source of fire close at hand

success.description: Effect: The fire represents the strength of your holy zeal. While this blessing is recharging, you gain to Intimidate checks

boon.description: A character within close range suffers 1 stress or recovers 1 stress

bane.description: You suffer to Charm checks while this blessing is recharging

reckless.name: Fires of Faith
reckless.requirements: 6 favor. Target can see and hear you clearly. You must have a torch, brazier, or other source of fire close at hand

success.description: Your threatening and intimidating prayers to Sigmar influence the target as if you'd successfully used the Intimidate skill
As above, and the target suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue

boon.description: You or an ally within close range recovers 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: The target suffers 1 wound and gains the Cowed or Rattled condition (your choice) for 3 rounds
